raw_response.explainable_reasoning: The market is currently in a strong bearish trend on the higher timeframes (D1 down to H1). Price has initiated a bullish retracement on the lower timeframes (M5/M1) from the low of 4447.81, pushing into the H1 bearish FVG (4464.89 - 4497.47) and approaching the unmitigated M1 bearish Order Block at 4488.58 - 4489.25. This represents a high-probability 'SH+BMS+RTO' bearish setup. We place a limit sell order at 4488.915 with a stop loss at 4489.55 (structural invalidation above the OB with a 3 pip offset to avoid stop hunts). Our targets are structured at key liquidity pools: TP1 at 4481.48 (M1 swing low), TP2 at 4479.59 (M5 swing low), and TP3 at 4463.06 (major M5 swing low), offering an exceptional risk-to-reward ratio of 11.7R to the first target and up to 40.7R to the final target.

htf_bias.notes: HTF structure is strongly bearish across all major timeframes from H1 up to D1, with clear bearish BMS events and unmitigated supply zones.

evidence.content_preview: Metals (XAU/USD, XAG/USD) | Inverse correlation. Bearish DXY = bullish Gold bias.
DXY is a mandatory analytical layer on every cycle.

mtf_bias.notes: MTF structure is bearish with clear BMS and CHoCH events on M30 and M15, confirming institutional order flow is aligned downward.

evidence.content_preview: SL must be structural — placed beyond the invalidation level of the setup

stop_loss.reason: Placed above the M1 bearish Order Block upper bound of 4489.25 with a 3 pip offset to avoid stop hunts.

take_profits.basis: Targeting the nearest M1 swing low / SSL pool.
Targeting the M5 swing low / SSL pool.
Targeting the major M5 swing low / SSL pool.
